AT the meeting of this. league
Tuesday night sentiment of near
ly s40 delegates present showed
strong opposition to the action of
the city officials in their fight
against free speech. 1t was unani-
mou5y voted that each delegate,
representing the different unions,

Members of the league declare
II evident that the action of the
city officials in dealing with the
street fight will be severely cen
sured by each union represented
In the Union Card and Label
league.


The league will meet hereafter
on each second Tuesday and
fourth Friday of each month.
